description: The `hover` method synthesised by `impl LanguageServer for Backend` (the tower-lsp trait impl, src/backend/handlers.rs:20). Same pattern as Vault.hash — the impl block doesn't get its own node; we verify the impl by checking the method node it produces.

contract.notes: If Backend.hover exists as a method node, the impl LanguageServer for Backend block was extracted. The other LSP handler methods (goto_definition, references, rename, etc.) should also be present.
